4. INVESTIGATE why fear_greed, metals_cross_asset, and onchain have 0 recent accuracy samples despite being enabled.
5. ADD correlation penalty between RSI and mean_reversion (both use RSI internally).
6. MONITOR news_event signal (71.7% recent) - if this accuracy holds, consider increasing its weight.
